    # Add related entity information with relative clauses, grouped by subject
    for subject in other_subjects:
        clauses = []
        for p, o in entity_predicates[subject]:
            if p == "capital":
                clauses.append(f"the capital is {o}")
            elif p == "largestCity":
                clauses.append(f"the largest city is {o}")
            elif p == "country":
                clauses.append(f"which is in {o}")
            elif p == "location":
                clauses.append(f"located in {o}")
            elif p == "state":
                clauses.append(f"in the state of {o}")
            elif p == "municipality":
                clauses.append(f"in the municipality of {o}")
            elif p == "district":
                clauses.append(f"part of the district of {o}")
            elif p == "hasToItsNorth":
                clauses.append(f"with {o} to its north")
            elif p == "hasToItsSouthwest":
                clauses.append(f"with {o} to its southwest")
            elif p == "hasToItsWest":
                clauses.append(f"with {o} to its west")
            elif p == "hasToItsSoutheast":
                clauses.append(f"with {o} to its southeast")
            else:
                clauses.append(f"{p} is {o}")
        if clauses:
            parts.append(f", where {subject} is " + ", ".join(clauses))

    sentence = "".join(parts) + "."
    return sentence.strip()
